data.title: RED: Tests for test gate audit logging
data.description:
Modify tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh to add RED tests for structured audit logging (SC1).

## Test Cases
- test_audit_log_emitted: after gate runs on staged file with fuzzy-matched test, audit log file contains key=value line with source=, method=fuzzy, test= fields
- test_audit_log_test_index_method: staged file with .test-index entry produces method=test-index in log
- test_audit_log_no_match: staged file with no associated test produces no log entry (or method=none)
- test_audit_log_configurable_path: setting test_gate.audit_log_path in temp config changes log location

## Test Approach
Each test sets up a temp git repo with staged files and test associations, runs pre-commit-test-gate.sh, then reads the audit log file and asserts key=value fields are present with correct values.

## RED Marker
.test-index: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh: tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh [test_audit_log_emitted]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 4 audit logging test functions added
  Verify: grep -c "test_audit_log" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker entry exists
  Verify: grep -q "pre-commit-test-gate.*test_audit_log" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
